hooks.command: set -e; cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}" || exit 0; LOG="$HOME/.claude/mt-deploy.log"; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$LOG")"; { date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'; echo '--- Stop hook fired ---'; } >> "$LOG"; if ! command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[mt-deploy] docker not running — skip' >> "$LOG"; exit 0; fi; changed=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$changed" ]; then echo '[mt-deploy] no pending changes' >> "$LOG"; exit 0; fi; fe=0; be=0; echo "$changed" | grep -qE 'mt-pricing-frontend/' && fe=1; echo "$changed" | grep -qE 'mt-pricing-backend/app/' && be=1; if [ $fe -eq 1 ]; then echo '[mt-deploy] restarting mt-frontend' >> "$LOG"; (nohup docker restart mt-frontend >> "$LOG" 2>&1 &) ; fi; if [ $be -eq 1 ]; then echo '[mt-deploy] restarting mt-backend mt-worker mt-beat' >> "$LOG"; (nohup docker restart mt-backend mt-worker mt-beat >> "$LOG" 2>&1 &) ; fi; if [ $fe -eq 0 ] && [ $be -eq 0 ]; then echo '[mt-deploy] only docs / non-app changes — skip' >> "$LOG"; fi; exit 0

environment: Organization: BR Innovation. Primary use: e-commerce platform development (MT Middle East program — PIM, pricing, inventory, B2C/marketplaces)
Source control: github.com/BR-Github and all repos under it
Infrastructure: Hetzner (staging and production), Docker Compose + Caddy reverse proxy; no AWS, GCP, or Vercel
Key services: Supabase (Auth + Storage, bucket product-images), Redis, Celery workers and Beat scheduler
Local dev endpoints: localhost:3000 (Next.js frontend), localhost:8000 (FastAPI backend), localhost:54321 (Supabase local)
Stack: Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript strict, FastAPI + Python 3.11, SQLAlchemy 2.0 async + Alembic, Tailwind v4 + Shadcn/ui new-york
